response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a live performance by Secret Society holoX. 2. 00:00-00:35: Intro talk and jingle, no vocal music. 3. 00:35-end: Performance of a vocal song. 4. Identified the song as 'Chou Yume Dodekkai!' by Secret Society holoX. 5. Searched for the lyrics to 'Chou Yume Dodekkai!'. 6. Found full lyrics on multiple reliable lyric sites and translated them. 7. Mapped scenes and filled in the JSON structure accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video is a live performance by the VTuber group 'Secret Society holoX' (Laplus Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, Sakamata Chloe, Kazama Iroha). It begins with an introductory talk on stage, followed by a live performance of their song 'Chou Yume Dodekkai!'. The video concludes with a closing screen.

scenes.description: The members of 'Secret Society holoX' are on stage, waving and talking to the audience as an introduction.
A musical interlude/jingle plays as the group transitions into their performance.
The group performs their song 'Chou Yume Dodekkai!'. They sing and dance on stage.
